name: Maine Lobster Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Season with salt and paprika to taste.
2. Prepare bread crumbs or crushed cereal flakes for topping.
3. Melt butter in the top of a double boiler.
4. Add flour, mustard, salt, and paprika to form a paste.
5. Slowly add milk or cream while stirring constantly to create a smooth mixture.
6. Continue cooking until thickened.
7. Add lobster meat cut into serving pieces.
8. Incorporate bread, broken into pieces (not too small), and stir well.
9. Pour the mixture into a casserole dish.
10. Top with buttered bread crumbs or crushed cereal flakes.
11. Bake in a 350 degree oven for only long enough to reheat the mixture and lightly toast the topping.
12. Makes 4 generous servings.
